name: HMS Seychelles (K 592)
events: 26 Feb 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Sealyham (A/Ch.Skr. A. Keable, RNR) and HMS Thirlmere (T/Lt. H.O. Olsen, RNR) and later with HMS Knaresborough Castle (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J.F. Marchant, RNR) and HMS Seychelles (A/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Baldwin-Wiseman, RD, RNR). (1)

27 Feb 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Knaresborough Castle (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J.F. Marchant, RNR) and HMS Seychelles (A/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Baldwin-Wiseman, RD, RNR) and later with HMS Jasper (Lt. J.N. Kempton, RN) and HMS Sealyham (A/Ch.Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (1)
28 Feb 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Seychelles (A/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Baldwin-Wiseman, RD, RNR) and HMS Jasper (Lt. J.N. Kempton, RN). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
